mapper.sql: tja.employee_id, tja.process, tja.job, tja.authentication_level, tja.level, tja.surety, tja.first_general_grade, tja.second_general_grade, tja.three_general_grade, tja.first_theory_grade, tja.second_theory_grade, tja.three_theory_grade, tja.first_operation_grade, tja.second_operation_grade, tja.three_operation_grade, tja.credential_grant_date, tja.enabled_flag, tja.enabled_time, tja.dept_name, tja.department, tja.team, tja.work_card, tja.name, tja.attribute2, tja.attribute3, tja.attribute1, tja.id, tja.file_id, tja.create_time, tja.create_by, tja.update_time,tja.update_by

${tAlias}.employee_id as ${tAlias}_employee_id, ${tAlias}.process as ${tAlias}_process, ${tAlias}.job as ${tAlias}_job, ${tAlias}.authentication_level as ${tAlias}_authentication_level, ${tAlias}.level as ${tAlias}_level, ${tAlias}.surety as ${tAlias}_surety, ${tAlias}.first_general_grade as ${tAlias}_first_general_grade, ${tAlias}.second_general_grade as ${tAlias}_second_general_grade, ${tAlias}.three_general_grade as ${tAlias}_three_general_grade, ${tAlias}.first_theory_grade as ${tAlias}_first_theory_grade, ${tAlias}.second_theory_grade as ${tAlias}_second_theory_grade, ${tAlias}.three_theory_grade as ${tAlias}_three_theory_grade, ${tAlias}.first_operation_grade as ${tAlias}_first_operation_grade, ${tAlias}.second_operation_grade as ${tAlias}_second_operation_grade, ${tAlias}.three_operation_grade as ${tAlias}_three_operation_grade, ${tAlias}.credential_grant_date as ${tAlias}_credential_grant_date, ${tAlias}.enabled_flag as ${tAlias}_enabled_flag, ${tAlias}.enabled_time as ${tAlias}_enabled_time, ${tAlias}.dept_name as ${tAlias}_dept_name, ${tAlias}.department as ${tAlias}_department, ${tAlias}.team as ${tAlias}_team, ${tAlias}.work_card as ${tAlias}_work_card, ${tAlias}.name as ${tAlias}_name, ${tAlias}.attribute2 as ${tAlias}_attribute2, ${tAlias}.attribute3 as ${tAlias}_attribute3, ${tAlias}.attribute1 as ${tAlias}_attribute1, ${tAlias}.id as ${tAlias}_id, ${tAlias}.file_id as ${tAlias}_file_id, ${tAlias}.create_time as ${tAlias}_create_time, ${tAlias}.create_by as ${tAlias}_create_by, ${tAlias}.update_time as ${tAlias}_update_time, ${tAlias}.update_by as ${tAlias}_update_by

select
,
from td_job_authentication tja left join tool_local_storage tls on tja.file_id = tls.id
mapper.insert: insert into td_job_authentication (employee_id, process, job, authentication_level, level, surety, first_general_grade, second_general_grade, three_general_grade, first_theory_grade, second_theory_grade, three_theory_grade, first_operation_grade, second_operation_grade, three_operation_grade, credential_grant_date, enabled_flag, enabled_time, dept_name, department, team, work_card, name, attribute2, attribute3, attribute1, file_id,create_time, create_by, update_time, update_by) values (#{employeeId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{process,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{job,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{authenticationLevel,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{level,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{surety,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{firstGeneralGrade,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{secondGeneralGrade,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{threeGeneralGrade,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{firstTheoryGrade,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{secondTheoryGrade,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{threeTheoryGrade,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{firstOperationGrade,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{secondOperationGrade,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{threeOperationGrade,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{credentialGrantDate,jdbcType=DATE}, #{enabledFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, #{enabledTime,jdbcType=DATE}, #{deptName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{department,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{team,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{workCard,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{name,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{attribute2,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{attribute3,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{attribute1,jdbcType=VARCHAR},#{fileId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{createBy,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updateBy,jdbcType=BIGINT})
mapper.update: update td_job_authentication set employee_id = #{employeeId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, process = #{process,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, job = #{job,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, authentication_level = #{authenticationLevel,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, level = #{level,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, surety = #{surety,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, first_general_grade = #{firstGeneralGrade,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, second_general_grade = #{secondGeneralGrade,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, three_general_grade = #{threeGeneralGrade,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, first_theory_grade = #{firstTheoryGrade,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, second_theory_grade = #{secondTheoryGrade,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, three_theory_grade = #{threeTheoryGrade,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, first_operation_grade = #{firstOperationGrade,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, second_operation_grade = #{secondOperationGrade,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, three_operation_grade = #{threeOperationGrade,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, credential_grant_date = #{credentialGrantDate,jdbcType=DATE}, enabled_flag = #{enabledFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, enabled_time = #{enabledTime,jdbcType=DATE}, dept_name = #{deptName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, department = #{department,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, team = #{team,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, work_card = #{workCard,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, name = #{name,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, attribute2 = #{attribute2,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, attribute3 = #{attribute3,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, attribute1 = #{attribute1,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, file_id = #{fileId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, update_by = #{updateBy,jdbcType=BIGINT} where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
mapper.insert: insert into td_job_authentication (employee_id, process, job, authentication_level, level, surety, first_general_grade, second_general_grade, three_general_grade, first_theory_grade, second_theory_grade, three_theory_grade, first_operation_grade, second_operation_grade, three_operation_grade, credential_grant_date, enabled_time, dept_name, department, team, work_card, name, attribute1,enabled_flag,create_time, create_by, update_time, update_by) select tjai.employee_id, tjai.process, tjai.job, tjai.authentication_level, tjai.level, tjai.surety, tjai.first_general_grade, tjai.second_general_grade, tjai.three_general_grade, tjai.first_theory_grade, tjai.second_theory_grade, tjai.three_theory_grade, tjai.first_operation_grade, tjai.second_operation_grade, tjai.three_operation_grade, tjai.credential_grant_date,tjai.enabled_time, tjai.dept_name, tjai.department, tjai.team, tjai.work_card, tjai.name,'excel导入',1, tjai.create_time, #{userId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, tjai.update_time, #{userId,jdbcType=BIGINT} from td_job_authentication_interface tjai where tjai.group_id = #{groupId, jdbcType = BIGINT} and tjai.employee_id != -1 and tjai.data_status = 'T'
